channel.title: Comments on: “Beer America” Pilot with Sam Calagione, 2003 – Ep. 117
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Sean Jansen
item.dc:creator: Sean Jansen
item.description: Very Cool. Great pilot episode, everyone loves the Brickskellar.
item.content:encoded: Very Cool. Great pilot episode, everyone loves the Brickskellar.

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Well that was cool! Keep em coming.
Cheers!
item.content:encoded:
Well that was cool! Keep em coming.

Cheers!

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description: Sam has such a charismatic personality. You could see a star in the making then. Well done Paul.
item.content:encoded: Sam has such a charismatic personality. You could see a star in the making then. Well done Paul.

item.title: By: Sean
item.dc:creator: Sean
item.description: enjoyed this! thanks for sharing. keep up the great shows
item.content:encoded: enjoyed this! thanks for sharing. keep up the great shows

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: This is great...what a blast from the past! Sam looks younger but his camera presence is still great. Very cool to see.
item.content:encoded: This is great…what a blast from the past! Sam looks younger but his camera presence is still great. Very cool to see.
